channel.title: Resilient Systems on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Resilient Systems on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA SecurityX (CAS-005): Security Architecture
item.category: "CompTIA SecurityX Course" , "Security Architecture" , "Zero Trust" , "Cloud Security" , "Secure SDLC" , "Identity Management" , "PKI" , "CASP+" , "Enterprise Security" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master security architecture for the CompTIA SecurityX CAS-005 exam. Learn resilient system design, secure SDLC, Zero Trust, cloud security, IAM and PKI design, and data security.

item.title: Decentralization Dynamics: Mastering the 3.2.1-1 Rule for Blockchain Resilience
item.category: "Blockchain Technology" , "Cryptocurrency" , "Decentralization Strategies" , "Proof of Work Chains" , "Data Security" , "Network Resilience" , "Technology Trends" , "Digital Innovation" , "Blockchain Best Practices" , "Decentralized Systems"
item.description: Explore the power of decentralization in blockchain with the 3.2.1-1 rule, unraveling the delicate balance between security and efficiency. Can your network strike the right chord? Discover more now!
